name: Dominus Purge
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖王の粉砕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドミナス・パージ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If your opponent controls a card, you can activate this card from your hand. When a card or effect is activated that includes an effect that adds a card(s) from the Deck to the hand: Negate that effect, then if you have a Trap in your GY, destroy that card. If you activated this card from your hand, you cannot activate the effects of DARK, WATER, and FIRE monsters for the rest of this Duel. You can only activate 1 "Dominus Purge" per turn.
eff: If your opponent controls a card, you can activate this card from your hand. When a card or effect is activated that includes an effect that adds a card(s) from the Deck to the hand: Negate that effect, then if you have a Trap in your GY, destroy that card. If you activated this card from your hand, you cannot activate the effects of DARK, WATER, and FIRE monsters for the rest of this Duel. You can only activate 1 "Dominus Purge" per turn.

mst: Can be activated from the hand
Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
